mapper.sql: c.id, c.article_id, c.user_id, c.parent_id, c.content, c.status, c.created_at, u.username AS user_username, u.nickname AS user_nickname, u.avatar AS user_avatar
mapper.select: SELECT FROM comment c LEFT JOIN `user` u ON c.user_id = u.id WHERE c.id = #{id}
SELECT FROM comment c LEFT JOIN `user` u ON c.user_id = u.id WHERE c.article_id = #{articleId} AND c.status = 1 ORDER BY c.created_at ASC
SELECT FROM comment c LEFT JOIN `user` u ON c.user_id = u.id WHERE c.parent_id = #{parentId} AND c.status = 1 ORDER BY c.created_at ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comment WHERE article_id = #{articleId} AND status = 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO comment (article_id, user_id, parent_id, content, status) VALUES (#{articleId}, #{userId}, #{parentId}, #{content}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE comment SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM comment c LEFT JOIN `user` u ON c.user_id = u.id ORDER BY c.created_at DESC
SELECT FROM comment c LEFT JOIN `user` u ON c.user_id = u.id ORDER BY c.created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit}
